logger.message: #["[CRM SYSTEM API] Fetching customer | CustomerId: " ++ (vars.customerId default "unknown") ++ " | CorrelationId: " ++ (vars.correlationId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Customer Fetch

logger.message: #["[CRM SYSTEM API] Customer retrieved | Name: " ++ (payload.data.name default "unknown") ++ " | Tier: " ++ (payload.data.tier default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Customer Retrieved

logger.message: #["[CRM SYSTEM API] Customer fetch failed | CustomerId: " ++ (vars.customerId default "unknown") ++ " | Error: " ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log CRM Fetch Error

logger.message: #["[CRM SYSTEM API] Updating customer record | CustomerId: " ++ (vars.customerId default "unknown") ++ " | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Customer Update

http:request.doc:name: POST Customer Order Update
http:request.http:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.orderId, orderValue: vars.orderValue, sku: vars.orderSku }]

logger.message: #["[CRM SYSTEM API] Customer updated | CustomerId: " ++ (vars.customerId default "unknown") ++ " | Journey: " ++ (payload.data.journeyTriggered default "none")]
logger.doc:name: Log Customer Updated

logger.message: #["[CRM SYSTEM API] Customer update failed | CustomerId: " ++ (vars.customerId default "unknown") ++ " | Error: " ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log CRM Update Error

logger.message: #["[CRM SYSTEM API] Fetching customer history | CustomerId: " ++ (vars.customerId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log History Request

logger.message: #["[CRM SYSTEM API] History retrieved | CustomerId: " ++ (vars.customerId default "unknown") ++ " | Total Orders: " ++ (payload.data.totalOrders default 0 as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log History Retrieved

logger.message: #["[CRM SYSTEM API] History unavailable | CustomerId: " ++ (vars.customerId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log History Error
